channel.title: Tricks on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Tricks on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Windows - tipy a triky
item.description: Nastavenie premennej v rgistroch cez Command Line: "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\services\LanmanServer\Parameters" /f /v "SMB1" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" Nastavenie premennej v rgistroch cez PowerShell: Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanServer\Parameters" SMB1 -Type DWORD -Value 1 -Force Ako spustiť PowerShell skript z Command Line: C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -File C:\Windows\moj_skript.ps1
